content: I will declare the `draggedStage` state variable in `CompanyDashboard.tsx` at line 146.

args.Description: "Add draggedStage state hook to track the stage currently being dragged."
args.Instruction: "Insert draggedStage state initialization after activeStageTab state."
args.ReplacementContent: "  const [activeStageTab, setActiveStageTab] = useState<string>('');\n  const [draggedStage, setDraggedStage] = useState<string | null>(null);"
